agentRecommendation.reasoning: Highest resolution at 4608x3456. Flinders Pier in July 2019 (Australian winter — perfect off-season mood). The quiet pier composition carries the 'quieter and older than Sorrento' editorial claim. SA licence requires editor override.

rejected.note: DenisFrolow pier shot is strong but lower resolution than A.
PD licence is ideal but 800x533 is far below hero minimum.

editorOverrides.reason: CC-BY-SA 4.0 accepted — contingent on blanket SA policy approval.

notes: AWAITING EDITOR SIGNATURE. Contingent on CC-BY-SA policy approval.
